caption: The video features a man standing on the right side of the screen, wearing a red t-shirt with the text "Learning in Hand with Tony Vincent." He appears to be presenting or explaining something related to an interactive story template displayed on the left side of the screen. The template is titled "Interactive Story" and follows a format found in Tony Vincent's story planner, with a link provided for reference. The template includes sections for an introduction, questions, and multiple-choice options (Choice 1A and Choice 2A). The man seems engaged and is likely guiding viewers through the process of creating or using this interactive story template. The overall setting suggests an educational or instructional context, possibly aimed at teachers or students looking to develop interactive storytelling skills.
